metadata.description: Robworks Claude Code Plugins — a personal catalog of Claude Code plugins authored by Ryan Robson (ringo380).

plugins.name: ga-mcp-full
plugins.description: GA4 MCP server with full Admin API read/write access — bundled with Claude Code auth helpers and SessionStart bootstrap.

plugins.name: claude-quikgif
plugins.description: QuikGIF MCP integration for Claude Code — bundled MCP shim, CLI update notices on session start, and lifecycle slash commands (status, install, update, install-mcp).
